heading: Taxes on self-dealing
label: 4951 Taxes on self-dealing

children.heading: On self-dealer
children.label: 1 On self-dealer
children.text: There is hereby imposed a tax on each act of self-dealing between a disqualified person and a trust described in section 501(c)(21). The rate of tax shall be equal to 10 percent of the amount involved with respect to the act of self-dealing for each year (or part thereof) in the taxable period. The tax imposed by this paragraph shall be paid by any disqualified person (other than a trustee acting only as a trustee of the trust) who participates in the act of self-dealing.

children.heading: On trustee
children.label: 2 On trustee
children.text: In any case in which a tax is imposed by paragraph (1), there is hereby imposed on the participation of any trustee of such a trust in an act of self-dealing between a disqualified person and the trust, knowing that it is such an act, a tax equal to 2½ percent of the amount involved with respect to the act of self-dealing for each year (or part thereof) in the taxable period, unless such participation is not willful and is due to reasonable cause. The tax imposed by this paragraph shall be paid by any such trustee who participated in the act of self-dealing.

children.heading: On self-dealer
children.label: 1 On self-dealer
children.text: In any case in which an initial tax is imposed by subsection (a)(1) on an act of self-dealing by a disqualified person with a trust described in section 501(c)(21) and in which the act is not corrected within the taxable period, there is hereby imposed a tax equal to 100 percent of the amount involved. The tax imposed by this paragraph shall be paid by any disqualified person (other than a trustee acting only as a trustee of such a trust) who participated in the act of self-dealing.

children.heading: On trustee
children.label: 2 On trustee
children.text: In any case in which an additional tax is imposed by paragraph (1), if a trustee of such a trust refused to agree to part or all of the correction, there is hereby imposed a tax equal to 50 percent of the amount involved. The tax imposed by this paragraph shall be paid by any such trustee who refused to agree to part or all of the correction.

children.heading: Joint and several liability
children.label: c Joint and several liability
children.text: If more than one person is liable under any paragraph of subsection (a) or (b) with respect to any one act of self-dealing, all such persons shall be jointly and severally liable under such paragraph with respect to such act.

children.label: A
children.text: sale, exchange, or leasing of real or personal property between a trust described in section 501(c)(21) and a disqualified person;

children.label: B
children.text: lending of money or other extension of credit between such a trust and a disqualified person;

children.label: C
children.text: furnishing of goods, services, or facilities between such a trust and a disqualified person;

children.label: D
children.text: payment of compensation (or payment or reimbursement of expenses) by such a trust to a disqualified person; and

children.label: E
children.text: transfer to, or use by or for the benefit of, a disqualified person of the income or assets of such a trust.

children.label: A
children.text: the transfer of personal property by a disqualified person to such a trust shall be treated as a sale or exchange if the property is subject to a mortgage or similar lien;

children.label: B
children.text: the furnishing of goods, services, or facilities by a disqualified person to such a trust shall not be an act of self-dealing if the furnishing is without charge and if the goods, services, or facilities so furnished are used exclusively for the purposes specified in section 501(c)(21)(A); and

children.label: C
children.text: the payment of compensation (and the payment or reimbursement of expenses) by such a trust to a disqualified person for personal services which are reasonable and necessary to carrying out the exempt purpose of the trust shall not be an act of self-dealing if the compensation (or payment or reimbursement) is not excessive.

children.label: A
children.text: the date of mailing a notice of deficiency with respect to the tax imposed by subsection (a)(1) under section 6212,

children.label: B
children.text: the date on which the tax imposed by subsection (a)(1) is assessed, or

children.label: C
children.text: the date on which correction of the act of self-dealing is completed.

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of the taxes imposed by subsection (a), shall be determined as of the date on which the act of self-dealing occurs; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of taxes imposed by subsection (b), shall be the highest fair market value during the taxable period.

children.heading: Correction
children.label: 3 Correction
children.text: The terms “correction” and “correct” mean, with respect to any act of self-dealing, undoing the transaction to the extent possible, but in any case placing the trust in a financial position not worse than that in which it would be if the disqualified person were dealing under the highest fiduciary standards.

children.label: A
children.text: a contributor to the trust,

children.label: B
children.text: a trustee of the trust,

children.label: i
children.text: the total combined voting power of a corporation,

children.label: ii
children.text: the profits interest of a partnership, or

children.label: iii
children.text: the beneficial interest of a trust or unincorporated enterprise,

children.label: D
children.text: an officer, director, or employee of a person who is a contributor to the trust,

children.label: E
children.text: the spouse, ancestor, lineal descend­ant, or spouse of a lineal descendant of an individual described in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), or (D),

children.label: F
children.text: a corporation of which persons described in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), or (E) own more than 35 percent of the total combined voting power,

children.label: G
children.text: a partnership in which persons described in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), or (E), own more than 35 percent of the profits interest, or

children.label: H
children.text: a trust or estate in which persons described in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), or (E), hold more than 35 percent of the beneficial interest.

children.heading: Payments of benefits
children.label: f Payments of benefits
children.text: For purposes of this section, a payment, out of assets or income of a trust described in section 501(c)(21), for the purposes described in subclause (I) or (IV) of section 501(c)(21)(A)(i) shall not be considered an act of self-dealing.
